userDefinedField.fieldValue: Pay 0.8173% on fixed leg Receive EUR EURIBOR 1Y on floating leg 11,000,000 Expiry 13 may 2020
EMIR Eligible.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
